korean.politics: 트럼프 행정부가 이란과의 협상을 이어가는 동시에 군사 타격 위협을 반복하며 이중적 태도를 보이고 있다. 트럼프 대통령은 이스라엘 및 중동 동맹과의 협의 후 소셜미디어를 통해 미확정 합의를 발표했으나, 이란은 공식 확인을 거부했다.
korean.economy: 삼성전자 노조 찬반투표 이틀째, 투표율이 74.27%에 달했다. DS(반도체) 부문의 결집으로 가결 가능성이 높게 점쳐지는 가운데, 비메모리·DX 부문 일부에서는 성과급 격차에 반발한 부결 운동이 확산됐다.
korean.society: 중국 산시성 탄광에서 가스 폭발 사고가 발생해 최소 82명이 사망했다. 사고 당시 약 247명의 광부가 갱 내에 있었다. 제79회 칸 국제영화제에서 루마니아 크리스티안 문지우 감독의 '피오르드'가 황금종려상을 수상했다.
korean.international: WHO가 콩고민주공화국 에볼라 사태의 확산 속도가 대응 역량을 앞지르고 있다고 경고했다. 트럼프 행정부는 미국에서 영주권(그린카드)을 신청하는 외국인이 반드시 본국에 귀환해 신청해야 한다는 새 이민 정책을 발표했다.
korean.tech: 세계보건총회에서 2026~2030년 건강 경제 전략이 승인됐다. 중국어 번역 소설의 부커 국제상 수상이 확정되며 번역 문학에 대한 글로벌 관심이 높아졌다.

english.politics: The Trump administration continued oscillating between diplomatic overtures and strike threats toward Iran, after the president posted about an unfinalized deal on social media following talks with Israel and regional allies — a claim Iranian state media contradicted. The mixed signals prolonged uncertainty over the U.S.-Iran standoff.
english.economy: On the second day of voting, Samsung Electronics union turnout reached 74.27%, with the DS semiconductor division driving strong participation. While ratification appeared likely, a growing backlash among non-memory and Device Experience (DX) division workers over performance bonus disparities fueled a rejection campaign.
english.society: A gas explosion at a coal mine in China's Shanxi Province killed at least 82 people; approximately 247 workers had been on duty at the time of the accident. At the 79th Cannes Film Festival, Romanian director Cristian Mungiu took home the Palme d'Or for Fjord, a culture-war drama set in Norway.
english.international: The World Health Organization warned that the fast-moving Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo was outpacing response efforts, with authorities reporting over 130 deaths and more than 500 infections. The Trump administration announced a surprise change to longstanding U.S. immigration policy, requiring foreigners seeking a green card to leave the country and apply from their home nation.
english.tech: The World Health Assembly adopted a new Strategy on the Economics of Health for All (2026–2030), aiming to align economic systems with health equity. The International Booker Prize win by a Mandarin-translated novel drew renewed global attention to the field of literary translation.

vocabulary.example: The Trump administration continued oscillating between diplomatic overtures and strike threats toward Iran.
Iranian state media contradicted parts of the president's social media announcement.
A growing backlash among DX division workers fueled a rejection campaign.
The Ebola outbreak was outpacing response efforts according to the WHO.
Ratification appeared likely given the strong turnout from semiconductor division workers.
Director Mungiu took home the Palme d'Or for his film Fjord at the 79th Cannes Film Festival.

sentences.sentence: The Trump administration continued oscillating between diplomatic overtures and strike threats toward Iran, after the president posted about an unfinalized deal on social media following talks with Israel and regional allies.
sentences.point: 'oscillate between A and B'는 'A와 B 사이를 오가다'는 고급 표현. 'following + 명사'는 '~ 이후에'라는 시간 배경을 간결하게 표현.
sentences.similar: The central bank continued oscillating between rate hikes and pauses, leaving markets uncertain about the direction of policy.

sentences.sentence: The World Health Organization warned that the fast-moving Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo was outpacing response efforts, with authorities reporting over 130 deaths and more than 500 infections.
sentences.point: 'warn that + 절'은 공식 경고문 구조의 전형. 'outpace(앞지르다)'는 국제 뉴스에서 위기 상황을 표현할 때 자주 쓰이는 단어.
sentences.similar: Health officials warned that the disease was outpacing containment measures, with hospitals reporting a surge in new cases.

sentences.sentence: On the second day of voting, Samsung Electronics union turnout reached 74.27%, with the DS semiconductor division driving strong participation.
sentences.point: 'On the + 서수 + day of ~'는 진행 중인 사건의 경과를 전하는 뉴스 표현. 'drive + 명사'는 '~을 이끌다, 견인하다'는 뜻.
sentences.similar: On the third day of protests, turnout reached record levels, with students driving the surge in participation.

expressions.usage: 정책·태도·감정이 두 극단 사이를 왔다 갔다 할 때 사용하는 고급 표현
expressions.example: The administration's Korea policy oscillated between engagement and containment, leaving allies uncertain.

expressions.usage: 어떤 것이 다른 것보다 더 빠르게 증가하거나 진행될 때 사용
expressions.example: Demand for AI chips continues to outpace supply, driving prices higher.

expressions.usage: 정책·결정에 대한 강한 부정적 반응이 나타날 때 사용하는 필수 뉴스 어휘
expressions.example: The government's austerity measures triggered a fierce backlash from labor unions and opposition parties.

challenge.korean: WHO는 콩고민주공화국의 에볼라 발병이 대응 역량을 앞지르고 있다고 경고했다.
challenge.answer: The World Health Organization warned that the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo was outpacing response efforts.
challenge.explanation: 'warn that + 절'은 공식 경고를 보도하는 가장 기본적인 구조. 'outpace + 목적어'는 '~을 앞지르다'는 뜻으로 위기 상황을 표현할 때 유용. 'response efforts(대응 노력)'는 국제 공중보건 기사의 빈출 표현.

sources.title: Seoul Economic Daily - Samsung Union Vote Day 1
